DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF KEVIN MILLER'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. ONE, FROM DEFENDANT THE MARQUEE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AND REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVING THE MATTER DECIDED BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED IN PART. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE BY APRIL 6, 2012, THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTS, DATED BACK TO 2006 DESIGNATED AS "OUTSIDE COUNSEL'S EYES ONLY" PURSUANT TO A TWO-TIER PROTECTIVE ORDER: 1) ACCOUNT STATEMENT OF BOARD MEMBER KEARNY (UNREDACTED); 2) ACCOUNT STATEMENTS OF ANY DELINQUENT HOA MEMBER, REDACTED TO OMIT NAME AND UNIT NUMBER; 3) MINUTES OF EXECUTIVE SESSION MEETINGS WHERE ANY CONTRACTS OR DEALS WITH BOARD MEMBER KEARNY WERE DISCUSSED. ALL OTHER TOPICS IN THE MINUTES SHALL BE REDACTED. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERNST HALPERIN; REPORTER: JOYCE FINLEY, CSR #8620

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One, From Deft The Marquee Homeowners Association And Requests For Sanctions Against Deft'S And Their Counsel; Memo P/A; Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF KEVIN MILLER'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One, From Defendant The Marquee Homeowners Association And Requests For Sanctions Against Deft'S And Their Counsel - This motion will be heard at 9am on line 5 of the Discovery calendar. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

Plaintiff Kevin Miller'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No One, From Deft The Marquee Homeowners Association And Requests For Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KEVIN MILLER'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. ONE, FROM DEFENDANT THE MARQUEE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AND REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL.
Appearances: Michael Raifsnider and Cyndi K. Wong of the Raifsnider Law Offices (398.9001) for plaintiff and moving party; Nielma C. Bassig of Lewis Brisbois (262.8583) for defendant and responding party.
The parties stipulated to having the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem. Argued and the court ruled as follows: motion granted in part. Request for sanctions denied. Defendant shall produce by April 6, 2012, the following documents, dated back to 2006 designated as "outside counsel's eyes only" pursuant to a two-tier protective order: 1) account statement of Board member Kearny (unredacted); 2) account statements of any delinquent HOA member, redacted to omit name and unit number; 3) minutes of executive session meetings where any contracts or deals with Board member Kearny were discussed. All other topics in the minutes shall be redacted. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Reporter: Joyce Finley, CSR #8620

Appearances: Michael Raifsnider and Cyndi K. Wong of the Raifsnider Law Offices (398.9001) for plaintiff and moving party; Nielma C. Bassig of Lewis Brisbois (262.8583) for defendant and responding party.
The parties stipulated to having the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem. Argued and the court ruled as follows: Motion to compel further responses is granted. Request for sanctions denied. Plaintiffs to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Reporter: Joyce Finley, CSR #8620
